sentences.target: Ich kann dir den Weg zeigen.

translations.de: Ich kann dir den Weg zeigen.
translations.en: I can show you the way.
translations.fr: Je peux te montrer le chemin.
translations.he: אני יכול להראות לך את הדרך.
translations.vi: Tôi có thể chỉ đường cho bạn.
translations.nl: Ik kan je de weg wijzen.
translations.hi: मैं तुम्हें रास्ता दिखा सकता हूँ.
translations.el: Μπορώ να σου δείξω τον δρόμο.

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 1st person singular; occupies V2 and selects a bare infinitive at clause end.
2nd person singular informal dative pronoun; indirect object/recipient.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; marks the direct object noun.
Masculine noun, accusative singular; head of the direct object NP.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive; complement selected by the modal auxiliary.

sentences.target: Das Foto kannst du mir zeigen.

translations.de: Das Foto kannst du mir zeigen.
translations.en: You can show me the photo.
translations.fr: Tu peux me montrer la photo.
translations.ko: 그 사진을 저한테 보여줄 수 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 你可以给我看看那张照片。
translations.pt: Você pode me mostrar a foto.
translations.he: אתה יכול להראות לי את התמונה.
translations.vi: Bạn có thể cho tôi xem bức ảnh.
translations.nl: Je kunt me de foto laten zien.
translations.hi: तुम मुझे तस्वीर दिखा सकते हो.
translations.el: Μπορείς να μου δείξεις τη φωτογραφία.
translations.id: Kamu bisa menunjukkan foto itu kepada saya.
translations.ja: その写真を見せてくれてもいいよ。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, accusative/neuter singular; part of a fronted object NP (Topikalisierung).
Neuter noun, accusative singular; head of the fronted direct object NP.
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 2nd person singular; V2 verb; selects final bare infinitive and triggers subject–verb inversion.
2nd person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject placed after the finite verb due to V2 inversion.
1st person singular dative pronoun; indirect object/recipient.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive at clause end; complement of the modal.

sentences.target: Heute will sie mir einen Trick zeigen.
sentences.reading: /ˈhɔʏ̯tə vɪl ziː miːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nən trɪk ˈtsaɪ̯ɡn̩/

translations.de: Heute will sie mir einen Trick zeigen.
translations.ipa: /ˈhɔʏ̯tə vɪl ziː miːɐ̯ ˈaɪ̯nən trɪk ˈtsaɪ̯ɡn̩/
translations.en: Today she wants to show me a trick.
translations.es: Hoy me quiere enseñar un truco.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, elle veut me montrer un tour.
translations.ko: 오늘 나한테 마술을 보여주고 싶어 해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 今天她想给我表演一个小魔术。
translations.yue: 佢今日想畀我睇一個小魔術。
translations.ru: Сегодня она хочет показать мне фокус.
translations.pt: Hoje ela quer me mostrar um truque.
translations.he: היום היא רוצה להראות לי קסם קטן.
translations.tr: Bugün bana bir numara göstermek istiyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay cô ấy muốn cho tôi xem một trò ảo thuật.
translations.ar: اليوم تريد أن تريني خدعة سحرية.
translations.nl: Vandaag wil ze me een truc laten zien.
translations.uk: Сьогодні вона хоче показати мені фокус.
translations.hu: Ma egy trükköt akar nekem megmutatni.
translations.hi: आज वह मुझे एक जादू का करतब दिखाना चाहती है.
translations.el: Σήμερα θέλει να μου δείξει ένα κόλπο.
translations.nb: I dag vil hun vise meg et triks.
translations.id: Hari ini dia ingin menunjukkan kepadaku sebuah trik sulap.
translations.sv: I dag vill hon visa mig ett trick.
translations.ro: Astăzi vrea să-mi arate un truc.
translations.da: I dag vil hun vise mig et trylletrick.
translations.fi: Tänään hän haluaa näyttää minulle tempun.
translations.ja: 今日は彼女が私に手品を見せたがっています。

tokens.explanation: Temporal adverb in prefield; frames the clause and occupies the initial position (triggers V2).
Modal auxiliary, present indicative, 3rd person singular; V2 verb selecting a bare infinitive at clause end.
3rd person singular feminine nominative personal pronoun; subject placed after the finite verb due to V2.
1st person singular dative pronoun; indirect object/recipient.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner for the direct object noun.
Masculine noun, accusative singular; head of the direct object NP.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive at clause end; complement of the modal auxiliary.

sentences.target: Im Zoo möchte ich dem Kind die Tiere zeigen.
sentences.reading: /ɪm tsoː ˈmœçtə ɪç deːm kɪnt diː ˈtiːʁə ˈtsaɪ̯ɡn̩/

translations.de: Im Zoo möchte ich dem Kind die Tiere zeigen.
translations.ipa: /ɪm tsoː ˈmœçtə ɪç deːm kɪnt diː ˈtiːʁə ˈtsaɪ̯ɡn̩/
translations.en: At the zoo, I’d like to show the child the animals.
translations.es: En el zoológico, me gustaría mostrarle al niño los animales.
translations.fr: Au zoo, j’aimerais montrer les animaux à l’enfant.
translations.it: Allo zoo, vorrei mostrare gli animali al bambino.
translations.zh-Hans: 在动物园里，我想带孩子看看动物。
translations.yue: 喺動物園我想帶個細路睇下啲動物。
translations.ru: В зоопарке я хотел бы показать ребёнку животных.
translations.pt: No zoológico, eu gostaria de mostrar os animais para a criança.
translations.he: בגן החיות אני רוצה להראות לילד את החיות.
translations.tr: Hayvanat bahçesinde çocuğa hayvanları göstermek istiyorum.
translations.vi: Ở sở thú, tôi muốn cho đứa trẻ xem các con vật.
translations.ar: في حديقة الحيوان، أود أن أري الطفل الحيوانات.
translations.nl: In de dierentuin wil ik het kind de dieren laten zien.
translations.uk: У зоопарку я хочу показати дитині тварин.
translations.hu: Az állatkertben meg szeretném mutatni a gyereknek az állatokat.
translations.hi: चिड़ियाघर में मैं बच्चे को जानवर दिखाना चाहता हूँ.
translations.pl: W zoo chciałbym pokazać dziecku zwierzęta.
translations.el: Στο ζωολογικό κήπο θα ήθελα να δείξω στο παιδί τα ζώα.
translations.nb: I dyrehagen vil jeg gjerne vise barnet dyrene.
translations.id: Di kebun binatang, saya ingin menunjukkan hewan-hewan kepada anak itu.
translations.sv: På zoo vill jag gärna visa barnet djuren.
translations.ro: La grădina zoologică, aș vrea să-i arăt copilului animalele.
translations.cs: V zoo биx chtěl ukázat dítěti zvířata.
translations.da: I zoologisk have vil jeg gerne vise barnet dyrene.
translations.ja: 動物園で、子どもに動物を見せたいです。

tokens.explanation: Contraction of the preposition 'in' + definite article 'dem' (dative singular); introduces a locative PP placed in sentence-initial position (Vorfeld).
Noun; complement of the preposition; dative singular governed by 'in'.
Modal auxiliary (Konjunktiv II form used modally), present, 1st person singular; V2 verb selecting a bare infinitive.
1st person singular nominative personal pronoun; subject following the finite verb due to V2 order.
Definite article, dative singular; determiner of the indirect object NP ('dem Kind').
Neuter noun, dative singular; head of the indirect object NP governed by the verb.
Definite article, plural (accusative here); determiner of the direct object NP.
Plural noun, accusative; head of the direct object NP.
Main lexical verb in bare infinitive at clause end; complement selected by the modal auxiliary.
